entries.raw_en:
ent-ProjectileSpellCardPurpleNoHoming = enchanted card
    .desc = A piece of paper enchanted to give it extreme durability and stiffness, along with a very hot burn to anyone unfortunate enough to get hit by a charged one.

ent-BulletMagicNoMuzzleFlash = magic bullet
    .desc = If you can see this you're probably dead!

ent-FloraRockSolidFading = boulder
    .desc = A volcanic rock. Pioneers used to ride these babies for miles.
ent-SpawnPointWizard = ghost role spawn point
ent-SpawnPointGhostWraith = ghost role spawn point

ent-MobAncientRobot2 = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobAncientRobot3 = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobAncientLegs = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobSkeletonGoonLesser = malicious skeleton
    .desc = A hostile skeleton summoned by a wraith.

ent-MobSkeletonGoonWraith = malicious skeleton
    .desc = A hostile skeleton summoned by a wraith.

ent-MobCrunchedWraith = transposed scientist
    .desc = A fellow who seems to have been shunted between dimensions. Not a good state to be in.

ent-MobShadeWraith = darkness
    .desc = Oh god.

ent-MobMonstrosityHeadWraith = mechanical monstrosity
    .desc = A severely disfigured human torso which is forcibly kept alive by the mechanical parts...

ent-MobMonstrosityBodyWraith = mechanical monstrosity
    .desc = A severely disfigured human torso which is forcibly kept alive by the mechanical parts...

ent-MobLionWraith = lion
    .desc = Oh christ.

ent-MobAncientRepairBotWraith = strange robot
    .desc = It looks like some sort of floating repair bot or something?

ent-MobAncientGuardBotWraith = strange robot
    .desc = A Security Robot, something seems a bit off.

ent-MobAncientRobot1Wraith = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobAncientRobot2Wraith = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobAncientRobot3Wraith = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobAncientLegsWraith = ???
    .desc = What the hell is that?

ent-MobBearGoonWraith = bear
    .desc = Why are you staring? Never seen a bear before?

ent-MobBrullbarWraith = brullbar
    .desc = Oh god.

ent-MobBGunbotWraith = gunbot
    .desc = A Security Robot, something seems a bit off.

ent-MobNukebotWraith = syndicate gunbot
    .desc = An older model of the syndicate assault borg, specialized for close quarter combat.

ent-MobSkeletonCommanderWraith = skeleton commander
    .desc = A bulky skeleton here to encourage his friends.

ent-MobVoidSpikerWraith = Tentacle fiend
    .desc = Standing still is probably not a good idea.

ent-MobVoidHoundWraith = Voidhound
    .desc = You probably shouldn't be staring at this thing.

ent-RitualCircle1 = Summoning portal
    .desc = It hums and thrums as you stare at it. Dark shadows weave in and out of sight within.

ent-RitualCircle2 = Summoning portal
    .desc = It hums and thrums as you stare at it. Dark shadows weave in and out of sight within.

ent-RitualCircle3 = Summoning portal
    .desc = It hums and thrums as you stare at it. Dark shadows weave in and out of sight within.

ent-RitualCircle4 = Summoning portal
    .desc = It hums and thrums as you stare at it. Dark shadows weave in and out of sight within.

ent-RitualCircle5 = Summoning portal
    .desc = It hums and thrums as you stare at it. Dark shadows weave in and out of sight within.

ent-ClothingBackpackXenoBioTankFilled = xenovac containment tank
    .desc = Holds xenofauna. Also contains a vacuum nozzle on it's side. It's just like slime rancher.

ent-DroneSatchelUnremovable = satchel
    .desc = A trendy looking satchel.

ent-trayScannerUnremoveable = t-ray scanner
    .desc = A high-tech scanning device that uses Terahertz Radiation to detect subfloor infrastructure.

ent-OmnitoolUnremoveable = omnitool
    .desc = A drone's best friend.

ent-WelderExperimentalUnremoveable = experimental welding tool
    .desc = An experimental welder capable of self-fuel generation and less harmful to the eyes.

ent-RCDRechargingUnremoveable = experimental RCD
    .desc = Cyborg-mounted Rapid Construction Device which creates compressed matter on the fly using an internal fabricator.

ent-NetworkConfiguratorUnremoveable = network configurator
    .desc = A tool for linking devices together. Has two modes, a list mode for mass linking devices and a linking mode for advanced device linking.

ent-PinpointerStationUnremoveable = station pinpointer
    .desc = You are the station. Find yourself. Press E to activate.

ent-ClothingBackpackSatchelDrone = satchel
    .desc = A trendy looking satchel.

ent-LockerSalvageSpecialistFilledHardsuit = salvage specialist's locker
    .desc = Contains equipment useful for space exploration.

ent-LockerSalvageSpecialistFilled = salvage specialist's locker
    .desc = Contains equipment useful for space exploration.

ent-LockerShaftMinerFilledHardsuit = shaft miner's locker
    .desc = Contains equipment useful for planet exploration.

ent-LockerShaftMinerFilled = shaft miner's locker
    .desc = Contains equipment useful for planet exploration.

ent-MobLavalandGoliath = goliath
    .desc = A massive beast that uses long tentacles to ensnare its prey, threatening them is not advised under any conditions.

ent-DefaultStationBeaconLavalandRuin = station beacon
    .desc = A small device that transmits information to station maps. Can be configured.

ent-DefaultStationBeaconRuinAbductor = station beacon
    .desc = A small device that transmits information to station maps. Can be configured.

ent-DefaultStationBeaconRuinArrivals = station beacon
    .desc = A small device that transmits information to station maps. Can be configured.
